The '''Imperial loader shuttle''' was a modified type of [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Loader3.jpg|thumb|left|150px|An Imperial loader [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] clearing its way with its forward [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].]]

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] loader was modified with special containers carrying [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] and other small vehicles like [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PTs]]. Alternatively to carrying AT-STs, Imperial loader shuttles could also carry [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]], and [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]]. The container's assault ramp was located on the side, and the landing ramp was under the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]]. The loader shuttle would carry and drop these ground units onto the battlefield.<ref name="RS II guide" />

The [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] could land the containers directly on the ground as well as drop them from the air. Upon approaching its target area, the shuttle would fold its wings up, release its claws to drop the container, fold its claws back up underneath itself while getting the wings back into flight mode and fly out of the combat area.<ref name="RS II" /> Maneuvering jets were located throughout the craft.<ref name="RS II guide" />

The loader shuttle was armed with at least eight forward retractable [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], a [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile launcher]], a retractable [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] on the neck, and two [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blasters]] next to the cockpit.<ref name="RS II guide" />

==History==
[[File:Loader1.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Imperial loader shuttles on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin IV]].]]
Loader shuttles were used in many battles, including the Empire's [[Attack on Yavin 4|invasion of Yavin]]<ref name="RS III">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''</ref> and the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].<ref name="RS II">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]''</ref> As the Imperial loader shuttles were unable to effectively defend themselves against Rebel fighters, they were commonly escorted into battle by a pair of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] each.

==Behind the scenes==
Loader shuttles appear in the [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (series)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series. Loader shuttles are included in an alternate history scenario of the [[Evacuation of Yavin]], where the player flies as Darth Vader and destroys Rebel transports at Yavin base. Curiously, their cargo modules feature the emblem of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] on them, not that of the Galactic Empire, despite the shuttles only ever been seen in material set during or after [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''
